programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk and his Darkbane minions have discovered a way to make their ghouls faster and stronger - giving them an edge over the Shane Gang. In order to even the odds, Eli is going to need his most powerful slugs and an upgraded blaster from Redhook. The only problem is, Dr. Blakk already has the slingersmith working for him... Eli and the gang attempt a daring rescue mission to free Redhook, but along the way discover Blakk has a much more sinister plan in the works.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang have vanquished Dr. Blakk. But a new threat emerges from beyond the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A new member joins the Shane Gang! His name is Junjie, and he is a master of the mysterious slugslinging art of Slug Fu. But even with the power of five slingers, the Shane Gang find themselves in over their heads trying to protect the ancient Elemental Slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang and Junjie race across the 99 caverns to keep the Elemental Slugs out of the hands of the Goon.

programme.desc: To save Slugterra and the Elemental Slugs reaches its climax as the Shane Gang face a final showdown.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf. But can the Shane Gang help a bad guy learn to do good?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrive at a cavern overrun by thieves terrorizing the good townfolk, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid-the only one the Eastern Caverns have ever seen. However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In Ash's second challenge against the Orange Crew, he must climb a mountain, build a bobsled, and win a sled race! Do his Pokémon have what it takes to help him through these obstacles?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes' explorations take them to the seven Grapefruit Islands, where they learn that the islands' famous fruit has been disappearing! Ash, Misty, and Tracey set out to catch whoever's responsible.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When divers recover an ancient Orange League Championship trophy, our heroes head straight for the art museum where it's on display to check it out! Unfortunately, Team Rocket has beaten them to the punch…

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Team Rocket crashes on an island, Meowth is the center of attention when the locals mistake him for the "Great Meowth of Bounty," a powerful creature spoken of in prophecy. What will happen when they learn the truth?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Misty is not pleased when our heroes land on an island swarming with Bug-type Pokémon, though Ash and Tracey are having a blast. When they find an injured Scyther, can Misty overcome her disgust and help out?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Ash and friends find a wonderful island brimming with many kinds of fruit trees, they decide to take a break and enjoy the bounty! Of course, Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a couple of Trainers who don't seem to get along at all, even though their Nidoran are obviously smitten with each other. Misty is determined to solve this romantic challenge!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Slogging through a thunderstorm, our heroes notice a group of Magnemite soaking up electricity from the lightning bolts. When they finally get into town to rest, there's a blackout! Can the Magnemite help?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In Trovitopolis City, Ash and friends hear stories about some kind of monster that's been scaring everyone—and when the ground cracks open and dumps them in the sewer, it seems they might meet this monster face to face!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After Misty dives into a whirlpool to rescue a girl, she learns that the girl's brother, Rudy, has a giant crush on her. Things get more complicated when it turns out he's also the Gym Leader Ash must challenge next!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends go in search of super-sized Pokémon, but when they fall for a Team Rocket trick, and then Pikachu and Meowth get snatched up by a giant Pidgeot, everyone must work together to get them back!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After hearing about Ash from the Trovita Island Gym Leader, another Trainer seeks him out for a battle...and after Pikachu is knocked out, Ash turns to his Charizard. But can he get the unruly Pokémon to listen to him?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes' plans are interrupted by a raging fire in a nearby warehouse. When they try to fight the flames, they quickly find themselves in need of the local fire department: Team Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.title: Grojband

programme.title: Monsuno

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Invent'Tom

programme.title: The Pirates Next Door

programme.title: Ruby & Bonnie
programme.desc: Ruby and Bonnie try to make lunch after playing and lava comes out of the kitchen instead. programme.title: Ethan Gamer Plays Roblox
programme.desc: Gotta keep jumping! Who is going to survive? You will have painful choices don't go the wrong way and you could go EXTREME!

programme.title: LEGO® Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Nova is quite rude to Liann about one of her drawings during art class, and Liann angrily scribbles a secret picture of Nova being a monster. Meanwhile, Zac and Aliya clash as roommates showcasing Zac's affluenza and his previous inexperience with chores. After Liann accidentally misplaces the drawing, she goes to great lengths (think Mission Impossible) to recover it. Although Zac tries to do some chores, he's quite terrible at it, causing more drama until Aliya suggests he clean as if he's doing something he loves: taekwondo. Eventually, Nova presents Liann's drawing of Monster Nova to Liann and horrified, Liann apologizes. Nova admits she's known all along and quite liked Monster Nova... and watching Liann squirm a bit.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making a giant Tricky Sticky Rice Dumpling and need six handfuls of tricky stick rice. Gathering the rice should be no problem, however, when the sticky rice comes alive, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble find themselves in a sticky situation! Can they get the rice they need to the kitchen to the Cooking Countdown, or will the tricky stick rice plants chase them out of town? / The Bumble Nums are making a Chilly Cherry Cheesecake and need nine chilly cherries of different sizes! Once the cherries chill to the proper temperature, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble get to picking! The recipe calls for three small cherries, three medium cherries, and three big cherries. Can they gather the right sizes and get the ingredients to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? / The Bumble Nums are making Boogie Down Baba Ganoush and need four boogieing eggplants! So, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble break out their best dance moves to get the eggplants moving and help catch them! But, how can they get the ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? Maybe a boogie down conga line will work?

programme.title: The Bumble Nums
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making delicious Boomerang Banana Splits and need three boomeranging bananas! Humble, Grumble, and Stumble believe catching boomeranging bananas is so easy! But, is it? Can the Bumble Nums bag the three bananas they need in time for the Cooking Countdown? / Mmm. Today, the Bumble Nums are making Mouthwatering Mac and Cheese! They need to wrangle six speedy cheese wheels from the barn. After a wild ride corralling the speedy cheese wheels, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble must race the secret ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown. Will they make it in time to make their mouthwatering meal?

programme.title: Mittens & Pants
programme.desc: When Pants the puppy tries to save the day as a superhero, he worries everyone has a super power but him. Mittens helps Post Pig Petunia deliver a special birthday cupcake the Mayor baked for Nanna Ribbit. But will they get it to her on time? Pants and Popcorn have fun digging the best hole ever, but when they forget to fill it in, Post Pig Petunia falls in and scatters her mail everywhere.

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger Series
programme.desc: Welcome to my vlog! I share information about my life, inspirations and favorite things!

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger Series
programme.desc: Stacie dares Barbie to do the "Eat It or Wear It Challenge."

programme.title: Learn and Play with Cowboy Jack
programme.desc: Where Does Recycling Go for Kids is a dive into what happens to our recycling once it gets picked up from our bins! Did you know that your recycled goods are sorted both by machine and by hand to make it to their destination where they are turned back into consumer goods and other products? Cowboy Jack is gearing up with a hardhat and high visibility vest to learn all about it!

programme.title: Total Drama Ridonculous Race
programme.desc: Our nine remaining teams make their way to Alberta, Canada to compete in a bull buster of a challenge.

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.desc: The Eurasian BEAVER is a keystone species. / DJ RED the robin redbreast might just be the world's favourite bird. / HUMPDY is a majestic HUMPBACK WHALE. / A small and quick diving bird, LADY KING, the electric blue kingfisher perches high above the slow-moving waters of rivers and streams. / BIG SONNY the mammoth Ocean Sunfish is super unique in appearance and style. / WILLY-T teaches us in his song, “I'm the white-tailed Eagle”, that these eagles where once a species of concern- they were almost extinct, but now they are making a comeback!

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.desc: MISS MABEL, the Eurasian MAGPIE, is one of the world's most intelligent creatures, she can even recognize herself in the mirror! / Don't get it twisted, DR NEWTON ain't no lizard he is a sleek stylish SMOOTH NEWT who likes the quiet life of slow-moving waters. / MC JACKY T is a rare NATTERJACK TOAD with a big voice! / HYPA HYENA, the cool spotted hyena from sub-saharan Africa, invites us to laugh along with her as we learn cool hyena facts. / The size of a house cat, LIL' P is a funky phat PINE MARTEN on the rise! On her track “The Pine Rhyme” she lets us know that she adores feasting on fruit, insects, small animals too, BUT her favourite food are bilberries, whose blue colouring turns her poop blue!!! / SIR FEATHAZ & LADY FEATHAZ are noisy and gregarious COMMON STARLINGS. They show us that they are very sociable birds, experts at mimicry and of course experts at mesmerizing aerial displays.

programme.title: Toca Life Stories
programme.desc: Does Zeke's cute animal video go viral? Can Nari save Leon from being eaten by her imaginary friend? And will Rita be able to prank THE prank master? Follow the gang and their quest to vanquish boredom

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.desc: A medida que se acerca el Día de San Valentín, un casamentero debe encontrar una compañera para un emprendedor que cree que permanecer soltero es la clave del éxito.

programme.title: Recuerdos de Navidad
programme.desc: Noelle hereda la casa de su madre y descubre que ella estuvo contratando a decoradores en Navidad durante los últimos años. Aunque Noelle trata de despedir al decorador habitual de su madre, él parece no aceptar su decisión.

programme.title: Enamorándome de Vermont
programme.desc: Una autora de best-seller que tiene amnesia debido a un accidente de coche, encuentra refugio con el médico local de una pequeña ciudad idílica en Vermont.

programme.title: Navidad en Graceland
programme.desc: Una mujer de Chicago lleva a sus hijos a un viaje de negocios en Memphis para que puedan visitar Graceland la semana previa a la Navidad, pero todo el plan da un giro inesperado cuando se encuentra con un viejo amor de cuando era cantante.

programme.title: Confusión en el Mediterráneo
programme.desc: Un cocinero encuentra el amor mientras se hace pasar por su hermano gemelo durante una competencia culinaria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: La tensión entre Maggie y Negan alcanza el punto máximo. Continúa la búsqueda de Ginny. Surgen preguntas sobre el camino a seguir por Armstrong.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie y Negan viajan a un Manhattan posapocalíptico aislado del continente hace mucho tiempo la ciudad en ruinas está llena de muertos y habitantes que han hecho de Nueva York un mundo lleno de anarquía, peligro, belleza y terror.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie busca a Negan para que la ayude a salvar a su hijo, al que ha secuestrado un sádico superviviente, al que llaman el Croata, que vive en Manhattan. Negan accede a acompañarla a cambio de que permita a Ginny integrarse en su comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Una anciana ayuda a Maggie y Negan a escapar de los zombis y los conduce hasta su tribu, a la cual los soldados del Croata tratan de exterminar. Negan revela que conoce al Croata: trabajó a sus órdenes hasta que lo expulsó por ser demasiado sádico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: La tribu les explica a Maggie y Negan el modus operandi de los Burazi, el cual ellos reconocen idéntico al que usaban antes los Salvadores, por lo que saben cómo atacarlos. Luther descubre que se ofrece una recompensa por Negan y lo ataca.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie y Negan llevan a cabo un ataque, pero no todo sale de acuerdo al plan. Ginny y Armstrog tienen inesperados contactos con otros.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.sub-title: Historias que nos contamos a nosotros mismos
programme.desc: Negan y Perlie se realizan confesiones mutuas mientras se abren paso por Manhattan. Maggie llega a la conclusión de que Tommaso traicionó a la tribu y provocó el ataque en el Madison Square Garden. Tommaso admite que llegó a un acuerdo con el Croata.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso

programme.title: Señora Acero

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: La Tuti cae en una emboscada y Erick somete al hijo del Teca, con quien enviará un mensaje a su padre. El fiscal sigue la señal del teléfono de su hija. Aracely descubre los crímenes de Mario.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Tras el crimen de Lidia, Escobar propone crear un grupo al margen de la ley para cazar y matar a los secuestradores: se llamarán MAS. Por otra parte, Nacho y Cecilia se besan.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Isabel, llena de dudas, se confiesa con el padre Miguel y habla más de la cuenta. La entrega del hijo de Thompson se complica.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos: Encuestas
programme.desc: Victoria sube en las encuestas y eso preocupa a Elsa, quien, en un intento desesperado por ganar votantes, le propone a Max cerrar Villa Catalina. El Chema comienza a interesarse en Rutila.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Eduardo tiene muchas cosas que decirle a José Ignacio y la rabia lo deja sin palabras por eso le pide a su joven abogado que cuide de sus nietas, pero Gabriel Robles tiene planes ambiciosos.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Las noticias del accidente llegan rápido. Eva está muy grave, muchos quieren verla morir, pero pocos pueden identificarla. Gabriel, Rosaura, su sobrino Rodolfo, José Ignacio y Bárbara hacen planes.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosa despierta y se encuentra con una terrible noticia, ahora todo es por el hijo de Eva, el pequeño Eduardo. Poner un solo pie en la mansión Sotomayor le muestra a Eva que no la quieren ahí.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Poco dispuesta a vivir rodeada de odio, Rosa hace una oferta para garantizar el futuro de Eduardo. Rosaura acepta el precio a pagar por deshacerse de Eva, pero no contaba con José Ignacio.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosa y Rosaura están abiertamente enfrentadas por el control de la empresa Venus. Rodolfo tiene su propio proyecto e incluye a la competencia. José Ignacio encuentra un aire familiar en Eva.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Ramón, el papá de Eduardito, llega de sorpresa a visitar a Eva y Rosa hace de todo para no recibirlo. José Ignacio intenta jugar en dos frentes, pero ahora tiene que dar muchas explicaciones.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Raquel se aparece en casa de Rosaura y le da un detalle importante de lo sucedido hace 18 años. Rosa añade información. Gerardo Júnior reacciona ante los planes de su hermano, José Ignacio.

programme.title: Rosa diamante

programme.title: Rosa diamante

programme.desc: Exploramos la longevidad en elefantes, tortugas e hidras, analizando adaptaciones, esperanza de vida y beneficios del envejecimiento natural.

programme.title: Reproducción
programme.desc: Exploramos la reproducción en animales mayores como leones y elefantes, analizando cómo la edad afecta su éxito y las ventajas en la vejez

programme.title: Poder y Dominio
programme.desc: Ovejas, alces y elefantes luchan por su poder al envejecer, mientras marmotas dependen de la familia para conservar su estatus social

programme.title: Sabiduría
programme.desc: En muchas culturas, los ancianos transmiten conocimientos. En el reino animal, orcas, elefantes y lobos enseñan a sobrevivir y adaptarse

programme.title: La Autopista
programme.desc: Desde siempre, la humanidad busca ir más lejos y rápido. Los caminos evolucionan, pero ¿realmente nos ahorran tiempo?

programme.title: El Centro Comercial
programme.desc: El centro comercial no solo cambió la forma en que compramos, para bien o para mal, cambió la forma en que pensamos sobre el tiempo.

programme.title: El Recipiente Plástico
programme.desc: El recipiente de plástico cambió la forma en que compramos alimentos, cocinamos, y cambió la forma en que pensamos sobre nuestro tiempo.

programme.title: El Microondas

programme.desc: Isadora tiene una cita con el hombre que conoció en el bar. El encuentro entre Alonso y Gaviota no termina como él esperaba. Rodrigo y Erika se divierten tomando y bailando, provocando que surjan sentimientos entre ellos.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Sofía descubre que Francisco la engaña con Isadora. Alonso invita a Clarita y a Gaviota a comer, pero ella no puede dejar de sentirse triste. Rodrigo trata de aprovechar los últimos momentos de su viaje para convivir con Erika.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Nikki va a buscar a Guzmán a Nueva York. Victoria se pone muy celosa porque Arriaga se va con Adriana y Liliana. Además, la proximidad de Carlos trae como consecuencia que Victoria tenga problemas con Nelson y Arriaga.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Kendra le lleva una rata a Odette. Por su parte, Guillo escucha toda la verdad acerca de la inocencia de Beatriz y Roy encuentra la carta que Nikki le escribió a Guzmán.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Nelson se burla de Carlos y Arriaga. Por su parte, Victoria sorprende a Nelson con su nueva amante, mientras Carlos le asegura a Arriaga que no se hará a un lado para dejarle el camino libre con Victoria.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Guzmán regresa a México y Liliana le pide que sean novios. Carlos le dice a Victoria que la sigue amando y la besa.

programme.title: El diablo no tiene sexo
programme.desc: Un apuesto hombre divertido y seductor intenta conquistar a una bella joven, que resulta ser un travesti.

programme.title: El compadre más padre
programme.desc: Un juez ayuda a un borracho de la calle a dejar su adicción, cambiar su vida y ser un ciudadano decente.

programme.title: Dos hijos desobedientes
programme.desc: Dos rancheros terminan su trabajo en la hacienda y van a la fiesta de un pueblo donde se gastan el dinero de su tío.

programme.title: Adán y Eva
programme.desc: Una singular narración de la historia de Adán y Eva durante su estadía en el Edén y su subsecuente expulsión.

programme.title: Al fin a solas
programme.desc: Poco después de casarse, un hombre tiene que cuidar en su casa a sus cuatro hermanas, que están separadas de sus maridos.

programme.title: Lástima de ropa
programme.desc: Un par de albañiles comienzan a trabajar en la fábrica del millonario Arturo. El rico empresario sale una noche en su auto y un malvado delincuente lo asalta, pero su mejor amigo lo lleva a la casa de una cabaretera.

programme.title: Marejada
programme.desc: Un médico va a trabajar a la costa, pero el presidente municipal lo recibe con indiferencia y solo se hace amigo de un niño.

programme.title: México nunca duerme
programme.desc: Una joven va con su novio a bailar y la abuela de ella sale a buscarla de noche en delegaciones, discotecas y cabarets.

programme.title: Salón Mexico
programme.desc: Mercedes trabaja como cabaretera para costear los estudios de su hermana. Los problemas comienzan cuando Mercedes y Paco, su explotador, ganan un concurso de danza, pero él se niega a compartir el premio con ella.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven se dedica a vender drogas en su escuela, un profesor se entera y lo denuncia. El joven les cuenta a los hombres que le venden la droga sobre su profesor y ellos lo golpean hasta dejarlo inconsciente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Don Tomás y su esposa Lupe están por inaugurar su cafetería, mientras eligen el nombre que llevará, ella sufre un desmayo y la llevan al hospital. Lupe muere y después de un triste funeral, los hijos de Don Tomás deciden con quién se quedará.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven es desalojado de su casa porque su madre la hipotecó y nunca hizo ningún pago. Su madre sufre un accidente y pierde la memoria él cree que lo abandonó, sus vecinos lo ayudan y le dan hospedaje en su casa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven se obsesiona con su profesor y trata de tener una relación con él, pero él la rechaza. La chica hace unas pruebas falsas para que todos crean que él trató de seducirla.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Pedro queda viudo justo cuando su mujer acababa de tener un hijo. Tras este terrible suceso, su hermano y su esposa intentan aprovecharse de él. Después de un tiempo se da cuenta que su hermano no hace nada y se está aprovechando de él.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Rogelio, un hombre comprometido con su novia, se reencuentra con Susana, su primer amor. Después de dudar y estar en una incertidumbre, se ve con Nadia y platican sobre el añorado primer amor que vivieron, dejando en claro sus sentimientos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un hombre mayor vende y empeña algunas de sus pertenencias valiosas. El hombre no es muy bondadoso y su desprecio hacia la gente hace que nadie lo quiera.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un chico se vuelve adicto a fumar sin saber que eso le traerá grandes problemas con sus sueños de ser un gran jugador de fútbol, además de hacerle daño a su hermano menor ocasionándole una gran enfermedad.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Grandes estrellas de la música acompañan a los pequeños en el reto de canto. La bailarina argentina, Laurita Fernández, se une como jueza invitada para calificar los retos de baile. Los capitanes rinden homenaje a Verónica Castro.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Es noche de sentencia y los cinco escuadrones darán lo mejor en el escenario. María León se une como invitada al panel de jueces. Los capitanes se enfrentan al reto de "Gali dice" para ganar un punto extra.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Es noche de eliminación y uno de los escuadrones deja la competencia. Los pequeños cumplen el reto de canto de Miguel Bosé con sorprendentes resultados. Los capitanes se enfrentan al reto del "Botonera".

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La competencia entra en su recta final y cada prueba será decisiva para los escuadrones. Yuri se une como juez invitada. Los capitanes comparten una parte de su vida con el público. Verónica Castro recibe una sorpresa de parte de su nieta.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: De día es un estudiante universitario y de noche bailarín exótico. Para unos era su guía espiritual, para otros era un peligro para su comunidad.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En medio de las tensiones raciales de los últimos meses, Ilia Calderón se adentra en el mundo del Ku Klux Klan y entrevista a uno de sus líderes. Un encuentro lleno de amenazas e insultos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hablan quienes conocieron desde niño a Juan Gabriel y quienes fueron testigos de su genio musical. Los rituales antes de enfrentar a su público y el testimonio de quienes permanecieron cerca de él.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En los campos de la Sierra de Guerrero, México, florecen la amapola y la violencia. Familias campesinas se ganan la vida con los cultivos ilegales. Los carteles de la droga buscan controlar el mercado.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Alrededor de 50 jóvenes de un mismo vecindario recibieron acusaciones de homicidios que los marcaron para siempre.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El drama de las misteriosas desapariciones de pilotos y los riesgos a los que se exponen en las selvas andinas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una mujer contrata a unos sicarios para asesinar a su marido, pero él descubre la verdad y logra salvar su vida.

programme.desc: Una mochila llena de aventuras y momentos muy especiales con Tony Dandrades.

programme.title: Charles Bradley
programme.desc: On April 26, 2012, the world-famous vocalist Charles Bradley and his Extraordinaires grace the stage of the Cigale in Paris. Success did not come easily for the American. Before Bradley (1948-2017) even considered a career as a singer, he tried to make ends meet with countless odd jobs. Only in 1996 he finally followed in the footsteps of his great idol, soul icon James Brown. Brown and Bradley shared the talent to bring an audience to ecstasy. With his mix of funk, soul, and R&B, Bradley has developed a sound of his own, in which a keen ear might find a few traces of James Brown.

programme.title: George Benson & Earl Klugh
programme.sub-title: George Benson and Earl Klugh - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1987, prominent guitarist George Benson brought his band to kick off day three of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Joining him to play songs from their joint album "Collaborations" was Grammy award–winning acoustic guitarist Earl Klugh.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Anita Oday, Göran Engdahl, Roman Dylag & John Poole
programme.desc: Anita O'Day boasts two wonderful concerts from 1963 and 1970 that present the “jazz singer supreme” in impeccable form. O'Day's horn-based approach to singing is in full effect throughout both shows including stand-out renditions in each show of audience favorites “Tea For Two” and “Sweet Georgia Brown” (both reprised from her triumphant appearance at the 1958 Newport Jazz Festival.) This show is a fitting testimony to one of jazz music's true originals and shows unequivocally why she is ranked in the top tier of vocalists along with Ella Fitzgerald, Sarah Vaughan, and Billie Holiday.

programme.title: Lalah Hathaway
programme.desc: Winner of five Grammys in four consecutive years, including the Grammy for best R&B album in 2017, Lalah Hathaway is a force impossible to ignore. The American artist has shared the scene with Prince, Snoop Dogg, Stevie Wonder, Anita Baker, Mary J. Blige, Frank Ocean and many others, an irrefutable proof of her keen musical sense and enormous talent. With a 26-year career, Hathaway is still highly sought after by the biggest names in music. See her transform the 2018 Sing Jazz festival scene into a real R&B club, where she flaunts her voice and stage presence out of the ordinary.

programme.title: Bobby McFerrin
programme.desc: Estival Jazz Lugano is an annual, open-air music festival that takes place over five days in the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. In 1985, American vocal virtuoso Bobby McFerrin took the stage solo at Estival Jazz Lugano. The one-man musical force stunned the audience with his unique vocal percussion as he delved into the crowd for this quirky and charming act.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: John Patitucci, Marco Pignataro, Joe Lovano & Terri Lyne Carrington
programme.sub-title: The Tällberg Foundation: "Jazz for the Planet
programme.desc: On October 19, 2021, John Patitucci (bass), Marco Pignataro (sax and musical director), and Joe Lovano (sax) showcased inspirational new originals at GBH's Fraser Performance Studio in Boston, MA, accompanied by Terri Lyne Carrington (drums), Nadia Washington (vocals), Chico Pinheiro (guitar), and Anastassiya Petrova (piano). This recording, titled 'Tällberg's Jazz for the Planet', was made in support of the Tällberg Foundation's message and aims to inspire positive climate action. Since 1981, the Tällberg Foundation has been trying to nurture new thinking, in part by looking at societal challenges through the lenses of artists.

programme.title: Rahsaan Roland Kirk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & Emma Smith
programme.desc: One night only! Welcome to the spectacular and decadent world of The Babylon Hotel, where music pours out of every crevice like bubbling champagne. In this concert, the upper class meets the underworld in a melting pot of euphoria and extravagance, nostalgia and pleasure with a carefree sinfulness only seen in the exuberant nightlife of the 1920s around the world. The concert features iconic music from movies and series, such as The Great Gatsby, Burlesque, and Babylon Berlin. The music is performed by the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and DR Big Band under the direction of Miho Hazama. The concert also features the Moka Efti Orchestra, and singers Madame le Pustra, Emma Smith, Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, and Nikko Weidemann, as well as dancers of Sweet Burlesque. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2023.

programme.title: Ludwig Wicki, Danish National Symphony Orchestra, DR Junior Choir & Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Ludwig Wicki leads the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and the DR Junior Choir in a sparkling concert program of film music. The program features a selection of music from great and Oscar-winning Hollywood films, including Titanic, The Bodyguard, Pirates of the Caribbean, Braveheart, and Moulin Rouge, written by major composers such as John Williams, Hans Zimmer, James Horner, and Klaus Badelt. Highlights include ‘He's a pirate/Davy Jones' from Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest ‘Now We Are Free' from Gladiator ‘My Heart Will Go On' from Titanic and ‘Shallow' from A Star Is Born. Featured soloists in this concert are the young talented singers Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger and Diluckshan Jeyaratnam. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2022.

programme.title: Pavel Milyukov & Boris Berezovsky
programme.sub-title: Works for violin by Franck, Fauré, Schubert a.o.
programme.desc: Russian violinist Pavel Milyukov and pianist Boris Berezovsky join forces in this concert recorded at Tchaikovsky Concert Hall in Moscow, Russia, on October 15, 2020. Milyukov has won prizes at various international competitions and has appeared at venues throughout Europe. He forms an excellent chamber music duo with acclaimed pianist Boris Berezovsky. On this concert's program are César Franck's Sonata for violin and piano Gabriel Fauré's Après un rêve Alfred Schnittke's Stille Nacht and Franz Schubert's Erlkönig. As an encore, the duo performs ‘Russian Song' from Igor Stravinsky's opera Mavra (arranged by S. Dushkin).

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances present Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73. Whereas it took the composer over a decade to complete his first symphony, he penned his Symphony No. 2 in just a few months, during his summer sojourn in the restful Austrian village of Pörtschach in 1877. Nicknamed his ‘Pastoral' symphony, the work is arguably the most sunny and optimistic of Brahms's four symphonies. Lyrical in character, it features joyful melodies. This performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.desc: Mixing classic R&B vocals with a soulful blues-rock base, Alabama Shakes have taken garage rock and turned it on its head. Alabama Shakes takes the Austin City Limits stage for the second time in support of their newest album Sound & Color.

programme.title: Funk
programme.desc: Funk is about the groove Funk is about the beat. Without the drums, without the bass, there is no Funk. Previously, Rock and Roll would put the beat on the two and the four, but by putting it on the one, changes the sound of the music and the rhythm of the music, and that really becomes the basis of what Funk is. James Brown is the originator of Funk. You have a guy who came out of R&B music, and he did something which hadn't really been done before, where he changed the rhythm.

programme.title: New York Hip Hop
programme.desc: New York Hip Hop is a regional subgenre of hip hop music that originated in New York City during the 1970s and recognized to have evolved first in the Bronx New York hip hop became a distinct subgenre after artists from other regions of the United States emerged with different styles. In contrast to other styles, this used complex lyrics for attentive listening rather than beats for dancing. The main components of hip hop culture from that time and still today are MCing, DJing, break dancing, and graffiti. With Public Enemy, Ice Cube and Big Daddy Kane

programme.title: Above the Tulip Fields
programme.desc: Soar above the vibrant & iconic tulip fields from the Netherlands for 2 full hours of relaxation. Viewers will slowly float over real tulip fields as seen from the drone perspective in the famous windmill-filled rural country of Holland, as captured by collaborator Nick de Jonge from Skeyes, who dedicated several weeks of filming and searching for the best fields during peak bloom.

programme.title: Wells Gray Falls

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness

programme.title: Sunny Getaways

programme.title: Playa Fronton: Dominican Republic

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E1: Shades Of Blue — Delve into the captivating world of blue and its soothing, tranquil essence. Through a masterful interplay of tones and textures, each piece evokes a profound sense of serenity, depth, & contemplation. Immerse yourself in a journey of introspection.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E4: Shades of Pink — Showcasing the gorgeous yet delicate energy of pink, utilizing shades ranging from soft blush to bright fuchsia to evoke a sense of sweetness, romance, and vibrancy.

programme.title: Seasonal Reflections: Spring Forward II
programme.desc: Seasonal Reflections: Spring Forward E2 — Experience the joy of spring! Bursting with vibrant hues and whimsical strokes, each piece embodies the spirit of new beginnings. Let the colors and creativity transport you to a world of fresh perspectives and blooming possibilities.

programme.title: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions
programme.desc: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions E3 — Celebrate the beauty of spring through the luminous brushstrokes of Impressionism. Featuring works by contemporary artists & old masters, the art is accompanied by contemporary classical music, immersing viewers in the colors & rhythms of the season.

programme.title: Happy Hour: Visual Culture
programme.desc: Visual Culture E1 — An energizing experience filled with bold illustrations and street art.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E1 — A jubilant tribute capturing the essence of merriment and relaxation through a symphony of colors, paired with the musical genres of electro, deep house and lounge. Each piece bursts with bold, expressive designs celebrating the beauty of unwinding.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Hispanic Artists Now I
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E1 — A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.
